properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Pain touches everyone Heartache falls on every heart And all of us go through the storm It doesn't matter who you are And you're up against the wind And you feel you've just lost your way Listen to me say…

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I loved you then, I love you now I will love you tomorrow When this world breaks you down I will give you strength to stand Look to me, take my hand and just believe Before this day ever began, I loved you then

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Time changes everything Moments fly by like the wind You can try to hold on so tight But you'll never get time back again You feel stuck with your mistakes Can't turn anything around And it seems there's no way out

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I won't let you go, not even for a minute So don't lose hope Pain touches everyone Heartache falls on every heart

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I loved you then, I love you now I will love you tomorrow When this world breaks you down I will give you strength to stand Look to me, take my hand and just believe Before this day ever began, Before this day ever began I loved you then, I loved you then
